item.title: FDA & Abortion Drug (Mifepristone)
item.description:
• Summary: The FDA plans to conduct an additional safety study of the abortion drug mifepristone following a court order, responding to legal challenges and ensuring rigorous evaluation of its risk-benefit profile in medical abortion regimens.
  • MoAs: Mifepristone is a progesterone receptor antagonist that blocks progesterone action, leading to endometrial breakdown and termination of early pregnancy.
  • Sources: Endpoints News
